TAILSCALE_API_KEY.note: Use for device inventory and ACL or SSH policy automation.

TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY.note: Expires on 2026-07-07. Use for headless node join or re-auth, not admin policy edits.

NEO_ALERT_CHAT_ID.note: Used for ops alerts and runtime bundle delivery.

PC_AGENT_TOKEN.note: Used by remote desktop agents for Sora command execution.

GITHUB_PAT_YESOL_PILOT.purpose: Yesol-Pilot GitHub PAT for approved Yesol-Pilot/* repo operations
GITHUB_PAT_YESOL_PILOT.note: Primary GitHub token. Prefer PowerShell or Windows Credential Manager; Git Bash may not resolve the manager credential directly.

GITHUB_TOKEN.note: Authenticates as neogenesislab in current master credential map. Do not use for Yesol-Pilot/* work.

GITHUB_PAT.note: Authenticates as neogenesislab in current master credential map. Do not use for Yesol-Pilot/* work.

ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.purpose: Text-to-speech API key for TikTok/Shorts content pipeline
ELEVENLABS_API_KEY.note: Stored in master .env.local. Imported from etribe-yesol WebPilot-Engine on 2026-05-11.

ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.purpose: Default Korean voice id for ElevenLabs TTS
ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID.note: Voice name: Anna Kim. Use for Korean TikTok/Shorts narrative narration.

ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID.note: Default: eleven_multilingual_v2 because it supports Korean plus style and speaker boost settings used by this channel.

ELEVENLABS_LANGUAGE_CODE.purpose: Language code for Korean TTS normalization

ELEVENLABS_SPEED.note: Default: 1.09, matching the owner's previous Anna Kim setup.

ELEVENLABS_STABILITY.note: Default: 0.12, matching the owner's previous Anna Kim setup.

ELEVENLABS_SIMILARITY_BOOST.note: Default: 0.18, matching the owner's previous Anna Kim setup.

ELEVENLABS_STYLE.note: Default: 0.07, matching the owner's previous Anna Kim setup.

ELEVENLABS_USE_SPEAKER_BOOST.note: Default: true, matching the owner's previous Anna Kim setup.

ELEVENLABS_ENABLE_LOGGING.note: Default: false for zero retention requests. If the account plan rejects it, do not retry with logging enabled.
